messages: This is a Rust-based chatbot gateway service (`Cargo.toml`, `crates/`) with platform adapters for Telegram, WhatsApp, and Feishu/Lark, plus a web UI, Docker/container support, build scripts, and service management files.
result_json.text: This is a Rust-based chatbot gateway service (`Cargo.toml`, `crates/`) with platform adapters for Telegram, WhatsApp, and Feishu/Lark, plus a web UI, Docker/container support, build scripts, and service management files.
